item.name: Morsel Trout
item.description:
This fair-sized freshwater fish is a popular source of sustenance in Urqopacha.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This fish's name has origins in both the Pelupelu and Yok Huy languages, respectively referred to as “the filling fish” and “the fish of scant flesh.” The modern appellation attempts to strike a balance between the conflicting perspectives.
